simulation_runs.strategy: Always pick HEAL_LIFE options, avoid DAMAGE
simulation_runs.note: Life stays 100-112 range. Drain -1/card fully offset by heal options +4 to +7. Cautious player cannot die. MEDIUM CONCERN.

simulation_runs.strategy: Pick DAMAGE_LIFE/currency options for higher rewards
simulation_runs.note: Aggressive strategy viable but risky. Death around card 18 with consistent minigame failure. Appropriate challenge curve.

simulation_runs.strategy: Mix strategies, use Oghams for heal/protection
simulation_runs.note: Balanced play keeps life 90-105 range with ogham interventions. Good tension in final 5 cards.

multiplier_analysis.behavior_score_0_20: factor=-1.5, abs=1.5, HEAL still heals 1.5x, DAMAGE damages 1.5x
multiplier_analysis.behavior_score_21_50: factor=-1.0, abs=1.0, HEAL still heals 1.0x, DAMAGE damages 1.0x
multiplier_analysis.finding_MEDIUM: echec (21-50) and echec_critique (0-20) produce same absolute scale for DAMAGE_LIFE. Critical failure should feel worse but does not. Low impact on gameplay.
multiplier_analysis.finding_POSITIVE: Math.abs() prevents HEAL from inverting to damage on failure -- correct UX decision.

groq_adapter_audit.finding_HIGH: GroqAdapter.generateCard() does NOT validate effect values against caps after LLM parse. A hallucinated HEAL_LIFE:50 or ADD_REPUTATION:druides:100 would enter the card pool uncapped. EffectEngine.scaleAndCap() caps engine-level (18/20/15) but raw LLM card data is unvalidated at card creation time.
groq_adapter_audit.task: T036 -- Add post-parse cap sanitization in GroqAdapter
groq_adapter_audit.llm_loading_gap_MEDIUM: During 8s Groq generation, UI shows nothing after fade-in. No spinner or status text. User may perceive freeze.

anam_persistence_audit.accumulation_behavior: Anam accumulates additively across runs via addAnam(). Correct per GDB spec.

faction_balance_audit.finding_MEDIUM: druides over-represented (31% vs expected 20%). Confirmed persistent bias from cycle 7 warning. ankou consistently lowest across all biomes.
faction_balance_audit.niamh_status: Improved in iles_mystiques batch (14/20 options = 70%) but globally still 19%.
faction_balance_audit.cycle7_imbalance: PARTIALLY RESOLVED -- niamh improved, druides still dominant

minigame_audit.verdict: PASS -- all 14 present, 3 fields have only 1 minigame option which limits variety

difficulty_curve.late_game_21_25: Victory achievable even at 40 life if cautious
difficulty_curve.no_escalating_pressure: MEDIUM: No difficulty increase mechanism after card 15
difficulty_curve.finding: Cautious players can never die -- game needs at least one pressure mechanism (e.g., drain increases, faction event)

new_backlog_tasks.title: Validate LLM card effect caps in GroqAdapter post-parse
new_backlog_tasks.notes: GroqAdapter.generateCard() returns unvalidated LLM effects. Add cap sanitization: clamp HEAL_LIFE<=7, DAMAGE_LIFE<=5, ADD_REPUTATION<=10 per option on parse.

new_backlog_tasks.title: LLM loading UX -- show spinner during Groq 8s generation
new_backlog_tasks.notes: 8s Groq timeout shows nothing in card-overlay. Show brief Celtic-styled loading text or spinner before card appears.

new_backlog_tasks.title: Difficulty scaling -- progressive drain increase after card 15
new_backlog_tasks.notes: Cautious healer survives indefinitely. Consider drain+1 per card after card 15, or faction threshold event at card 20.

new_backlog_tasks.title: Rebalance faction rep -- reduce druides, boost ankou in future cards
new_backlog_tasks.notes: druides at 31% of rep effects across pool. Future card batches should cap druides at 15%, boost ankou to 20%.

summary: Game loop mechanically sound. 14/14 minigames wired. 3 full-run simulations show correct life drain, victory, death paths, and Anam persistence. HIGH: GroqAdapter does not validate LLM effect caps -- hallucinated values could enter game. MEDIUM: No LLM loading spinner (8s UI blackout), druides over-represented (31%), cautious play too safe. LOW: Math.abs() means critical failure = regular failure for damage scaling.
next_steps: Dispatch gameplay-programmer for T036 (HIGH -- GroqAdapter cap validation)
Dispatch visual agent for T037 (MEDIUM -- LLM spinner)
Queue T038/T039 for next content/balance cycle
